hero.headline: Ship AI-native products without hiring a team
hero.subhead: Encadeiateia builds and operates web, mobile, and AI systems that normally require a 5–10 person team. One engineer, production-ready platforms, and automation from day one.
hero.microCopy: Based in Lisbon, working with SMEs and startups across Europe.

services.title: Custom Web & Mobile Apps
services.shortDescription: From landing pages to full SaaS platforms, I design, build, and run multi-tenant web and mobile apps on a battle-tested stack.
deliverables: Production-ready web apps and high-converting landing pages
Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with billing, authentication, and roles
Mobile-friendly frontends and admin dashboards on a shared platform
outcomes: Launch new products without assembling a full in-house team
Reuse a proven platform already powering 18+ live client sites
Reduce maintenance by centralizing infrastructure and deployments

services.title: AI & Workflow Automation
services.shortDescription: I build AI agent systems that orchestrate entire workflows end-to-end, not just chatbots.
deliverables: Multi-agent orchestration pipelines for critical business processes
n8n and Windmill workflows integrated with your existing tools
Monitoring dashboards and alerts for automated flows and failures
outcomes: Cut repetitive operational work by automating end-to-end processes
Turn tribal knowledge into codified, reliable workflows
Ship AI capabilities without maintaining an internal ML team

services.title: AI-Powered Content & Creative
services.shortDescription: A local AI production pipeline for images, video, music, and copy, running on your own hardware or private infrastructure.
deliverables: On-prem or private AI studio setup for your creative teams
Custom image, video, and music generation workflows
Branded templates and reusable prompt libraries for content production
outcomes: Produce content at scale without sending data to third-party clouds
Keep IP and sensitive assets fully private and GDPR-friendly
Let marketing teams iterate faster with AI-assisted workflows

services.title: Codebase Intelligence & Developer Tools
services.shortDescription: I turn complex codebases into interactive learning experiences with architecture diagrams, guided paths, and AI-powered Q&A.
deliverables: Interactive portal for any repository, self-hosted or managed
Auto-generated architecture diagrams and component maps
Guided learning paths and AI Q&A across 13+ programming languages
outcomes: Onboard new developers in days instead of weeks
Make audits, due diligence, and handovers understandable and repeatable
Reduce bus factor by turning code into a living, explorable system

services.title: Lead Generation & Sales Automation
services.shortDescription: I build multi-tenant lead capture systems with AI scoring, CRM sync, and automated follow-ups.
deliverables: Lead capture forms and micro-sites integrated with your CRM
AI-based lead scoring and prioritization for inbound opportunities
Automated email sequences and follow-up workflows
outcomes: Focus sales time on high-value leads instead of manual triage
Never lose track of a lead due to human error or missed reminders
Gain clear visibility into pipeline health and conversion rates

portfolio.title: Multi-tenant Web Platform
portfolio.problem: Agencies and SMEs needed modern websites without managing separate hosting, SSL, and deployments for each client.
portfolio.solution: Built a multi-tenant platform running 18+ client sites with Docker, Traefik, auto-SSL, and a shared React/Next.js stack.
portfolio.result: New client sites go live in hours instead of weeks, with centralized updates and near-zero maintenance per tenant.

portfolio.title: AI Agent Orchestrator
portfolio.problem: Operations teams relied on scattered scripts and manual steps that did not scale across clients.
portfolio.solution: Developed a Rust-based orchestrator coordinating 10 specialized agents with a real-time monitoring dashboard.
portfolio.result: End-to-end workflows now run autonomously, with humans only handling exceptions surfaced in the dashboard.

portfolio.title: Codebase Analysis Platform
portfolio.problem: CTOs and auditors struggled to understand large legacy codebases during onboarding and due diligence.
portfolio.solution: Delivered a single-binary platform that ingests repositories in 13 languages and exposes diagrams, guided tours, and AI Q&A.
portfolio.result: Onboarding and technical reviews were reduced from weeks to a few days, with clearer documentation and fewer surprises.

portfolio.title: Freelance Job Intelligence System
portfolio.problem: Freelancers spent too much time scraping platforms, ranking opportunities, and writing proposals manually.
portfolio.solution: Created a system that auto-scrapes job boards, scores opportunities using AI, and drafts tailored proposals for review.
portfolio.result: Users apply to more relevant jobs in less time and see higher response rates from better-targeted proposals.

portfolio.title: Local AI Creative Studio
portfolio.problem: A media team needed AI-generated visuals, video, and music without sending assets to external cloud providers.
portfolio.solution: Implemented a fully offline creative studio pipeline for generating and iterating on images, video, and audio.
portfolio.result: The team ships AI-augmented content faster while keeping all assets private and compliant with internal policies.

process.title: Discovery
bullets: Map goals, constraints, and existing tools so we know where AI and automation actually help.
Define the smallest version of the solution that still delivers real value to your team.

process.title: Architecture & Prototype
bullets: Design the system architecture, data flows, and integration points around your stack.
Build a clickable or functional prototype so you can validate the direction early.

process.title: Build with AI Agents
bullets: Implement features using a mix of custom code, AI agents, and automation engines.
Run tight feedback loops with weekly demos and a transparent backlog.

process.title: Deploy & Monitor
bullets: Deploy to production, set up monitoring, logging, and dashboards around real usage.
Iterate on behavior, fine-tune agents, and handle operations as the system scales.

aboutSnippet.text: Encadeiateia is a one-person AI agency in Lisbon focused on building and operating real software products. I work directly with founders and CTOs to ship web, mobile, and AI systems that would normally require a small team. The stack is modern, the tooling is automated, and every service is backed by production platforms I use daily. You get a single technical partner who both builds and runs what we ship.

contact.introText: Tell me about your project and where you want to be in the next 3–6 months. I'll reply with a clear next step, not a generic sales script.

fields.name: projectDescription
fields.label: Project description
fields.placeholder: What are you trying to build or automate?

footer.tagline: AI-native software, built and operated from Lisbon.
